summary: Full-stack testing of the Unitap Onboarding feature (WelcomeModal + SetupChecklist + GET/PUT /api/onboarding endpoints). Backend: 8/8 pytest cases pass (auth gating, status shape, items shape & paths, progress math, welcome_seen and dismissed persistence, partial-update no clobber). Frontend (browser-automation): 100% of the specified flows pass — Super Admin login → Dashboard, Welcome Modal auto-appears with '¡Hola Paul! 👋' heading and 3 numbered step boxes, 'Explorar por mi cuenta' (welcome-explore) closes the modal AND persists welcome_seen=true (verified via reload — modal does not reappear), SetupChecklist visible with all 5 items (business_info/logo/smart_card/first_client/first_quote), progress bar at 20% (1 of 5 done — business_info), each 'Ir' button navigates to the expected path (/tarjeta, /clientes, /quotes/nuevo?ai=1), X (checklist-dismiss) hides the card and persists across reload.

issues: The legacy '¡Bienvenido!' success toast briefly overlaps the Welcome Modal top-right corner. Cosmetic. Same issue flagged in iteration_1 — consider repositioning toast to bottom-right OR suppressing it when WelcomeModal is about to show.

action_items: No blocking issues. Optionally: hide/move legacy login-success toast when WelcomeModal is rendering to avoid the brief overlap on first login.
critical_code_review_comments: WelcomeModal.js & SetupChecklist.js both call GET /onboarding/status independently on mount — two parallel calls every Dashboard load. Acceptable today but consider lifting status into a React Query / context to avoid duplicate fetches and to keep the two components in sync after navigations.

SetupChecklist re-fetches only on window focus. After clicking an 'Ir' button + completing a task, returning to Dashboard via SPA navigation (no full window blur/focus) may not refresh progress. Add a refresh on route change or expose a manual refresh trigger.

WelcomeModal renders a 'Cerrar' X (welcome-close) and 'Setup en 3 minutos' (welcome-start) which the spec doesn't enumerate but both also call markSeen — good. No issue, just FYI for spec coverage docs.
Backend onboarding_status duplicates client/quote counts each call (count_documents). Cheap for now; consider denormalizing on writes if dashboard load becomes hot.
test_credentials: Super Admin pzsuave007@gmail.com / Uni2mkt007! verified working.
seed_data_creation: None. The test resets the Super Admin's onboarding_state to {welcome_seen:false, dismissed:false} at start of backend suite and again at end of frontend run so the next agent / human user will see the modal again. No other DB changes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: To re-run the Welcome Modal test, first reset state: PUT /api/onboarding/state {welcome_seen:false, dismissed:false} with the Super Admin bearer token. Pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_onboarding.py auto-resets at module setup. Frontend onboarding state for pzsuave007 has been reset to defaults at the end of this run. business_info item is already 'done' for this account (phone + business_address present) so progress starts at 20%. Other 4 items are 'not done'.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs found in this iteration.
